leadText: If you were looking for the character from Pokémon Scarlet and Violet whose Japanese name is Pepper, see Arven. If you were looking for the character from Pokémon Horizons: The Series whose English name is Pepper, see Pepper (HZ102). Pepper (Japanese: ペッパー Pepper) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A seasoning packing very spicy flavor. It goes nicely with oilier foods and works especially well when you add just a pinch for a hint of flavor.

It goes nicely with oilier foods and works especially well when you add just a pinch for a hint of flavor.
